title: stelis ascendens
intro: Stelis ascendens, also known as the Ascending Stelis, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Stelis ascendens are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
